scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace api" "npm run dev --workspace web" "npm run dev --workspace admin"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @inventory/shared && npm run build --workspace @inventory/ui && npm run build --workspace api && npm run build --workspace web && npm run build --workspace admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace api && npm run lint --workspace web && npm run lint --workspace admin
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @inventory/shared && npm run test --workspace @inventory/ui && npm run test --workspace api && npm run test --workspace web && npm run test --workspace admin
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e --workspace web && npm run test:e2e --workspace admin
